refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall minimize cycle time for each phase of the load→travel→dump cycle to meet the customer-defined target.
refined_fr.rationale: Decomposing the overall cycle time KPI into sub-FRs for each phase allows targeted design and verification of each segment, improving clarity and traceability.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure p95 cycle time for load, travel, and dump phases separately under agreed duty cycle and site conditions, then aggregate to verify overall cycle time target.
sub_frs: Minimize load phase cycle time to meet target
Minimize travel phase cycle time to meet target
Minimize dump phase cycle time to meet target

candidate_dps: Optimize hydraulic and mechanical actuation sequences for load phase
Implement efficient path planning and navigation algorithms for travel phase
Streamline dumping mechanism control and synchronization for dump phase
selected_dp.selected_dp: Optimize hydraulic and mechanical actuation sequences for load phase

potential_sources: Interdependency between load and travel phases timing
Shared sensor data for phase transitions
coupling_check.notes: DPs are logically decoupled by phase, with well-defined interfaces for phase transition events.

assumptions_risks: Assumes accurate sensor data and reliable actuation hardware
Risk of timing delays due to network latency in teleoperation
High safety criticality requires fail-safe actuation control
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider explicit DP for phase transition coordination to reduce coupling risk.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical actuation and control systems responsible for load phase execution

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Send load phase status and cycle time metrics to NGHE Solution

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receive load phase start/stop commands from NGHE Solution or Teleoperation

module_containment_scores.notes: High diffusion due to cross-phase coordination logic residing here.
Most load phase actuation logic and hardware contained here.
Limited involvement in direct load phase control.
Monitors safety but does not control load phase.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Load phase actuation logic and control is best contained within the Vehicle module to minimize diffusion and ensure tight control over physical hardware.
containment_risks: Potential interface latency with NGHE Solution for tasking commands
Risk of insufficient safety interlocks if coordination with Safety Services is weak
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Enhance interface robustness and safety interlocks between Vehicle and Safety Services.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FR refinement clearly decomposes cycle time KPI into manageable sub-FRs; selected DP logically addresses load phase minimization with acceptable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Cross-phase coordination logic diffusion in NGHE Solution
Interface latency between Vehicle and NGHE Solution
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module effectively contains load phase actuation logic minimizing diffusion.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification via telemetry data and tasking command logs is feasible for load phase cycle time.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of load phase control to Vehicle module with defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Add explicit DP and IM for phase transition coordination to reduce cross-phase diffusion.
Strengthen safety interlocks interface between Vehicle and Safety Services.

decision.justification: While the current level decomposition and assignments are sound, the cross-phase coordination and safety interlock aspects require further refinement to reduce diffusion and risk.
next_level_sub_frs: Minimize load phase cycle time to meet target
Minimize travel phase cycle time to meet target
Minimize dump phase cycle time to meet target

revise.why: Introduce explicit DP for phase transition coordination and safety interlock logic to reduce coupling and diffusion.

assumptions: Sensor data and actuation hardware are reliable
Network latency is within acceptable bounds
evidence_needed: Latency measurements between Vehicle and NGHE Solution
